title: Universal Tool 6 in 1 Multi-head Nylon Hammer
description:
When a lighter touch is desired, this is the ideal hammer for the job. This nylon headed hammer has six different shaped heads, in a "round the handle" pattern. You get pointed, cone, round, flat, and more. Just select the shape you want and start tapping. The hammer weighs a sturdy but light .25 lbs, so your hands have control and do not feel any stress. Ten inches long overall with an ergonomic and non-slip wooden handle. Six heads on one hammer - like having six hammers in 1! 6 Styles of white nylon heads that include pointed, rounded, flat, and more! Nylon is a great surface that is easy and will not marr metal and other hard surfaces. Great for metal shaping, crafting, hobby, clay, wax, sheet metal, jewelry making and more!
